headline: AI Data Center Power Equipment Supplier Surges As Growth Explodes
summary: Forgent Power Solutions, a supplier of power equipment for AI data centers, gapped up to an all-time high Thursday after the company reported that quarterly revenue more than doubled and management raised guidance.  The provider of electrical distribution equipment for AI data centers, power grids and industrial plants said adjusted net income rose 132% to $55 million.  FactSet put EPS at 16 cents.

raw.headline: AI Data Center Power Equipment Supplier Surges As Growth Explodes

The provider of electrical distribution equipment for AI data centers, power grids and industrial plants said adjusted net income rose 132% to $55 million.  FactSet put EPS at 16 cents.
